sql.i: select count(1) from abs_userinfo where userrole={userrole}

select rowguid,loginname,realname,password,userrole,openid,logourl,email,phone,address,ouguid,remark,addtime,isdelete from abs_userinfo where $like(loginname,loginname) and (isdelete!='1' or isdelete is null)
select count(1) from abs_userinfo where $like(loginname,loginname) and (isdelete!='1' or isdelete is null)
select rowguid,loginname,realname,password,userrole,openid,logourl,email,phone,address,ouguid,remark,addtime,isdelete from abs_userinfo where loginname={username} and password={password}
select rowguid,loginname,realname,password,userrole,openid,logourl,email,phone,address,ouguid,remark,addtime,isdelete from abs_userinfo where email={email} and password={password}
select count(1) from abs_userinfo where loginname={loginname}
select count(1) from abs_userinfo where email={email}
select count(1) from abs_userinfo where openid={openid}
update abs_userinfo set logourl={url} where rowguid={rowguid}
select userrole from abs_userinfo where rowguid={rowguid}
